// backend/src/services/poisService.ts
import fs from "fs";
import { POI_DATA } from "../utils/paths.js";
import { logInfo, logError } from "../logs.js";
import type { POI } from "../types.js";

// Read POIs from JSON file
export function getPOIs(): POI[] {
  try {
    const raw = fs.readFileSync(POI_DATA, "utf-8");
    const data: POI[] = JSON.parse(raw);
    logInfo("[poisService] POI data read successfully", { count: data.length });
    return data;
  } catch (err: any) {
    logError("[poisService] Failed to read POI data", { error: err.message });
    return [];
  }
}

// Optional: if you want to update POIs
export function writePOIs(data: POI[]): void {
  try {
    fs.writeFileSync(POI_DATA, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2));
    logInfo("[poisService] POI data written successfully", { count: data.length });
  } catch (err: any) {
    logError("[poisService] Failed to write POI data", { error: err.message });
  }
}
